title: cymbopogon plurinodis
intro: Cymbopogon plurinodis is a species of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cymbopogon plurinodis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
